task_completion.description: Verify that the agent accessed the official iFixit repair guide for the iPhone 13 Battery Replacement.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser should be open displaying the iFixit guide for 'iPhone 13 Battery Replacement'. The URL bar should show a URL containing 'ifixit.com/Guide/iPhone+13+Battery+Replacement'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the checklist text file was created at the correct location.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor should be open showing a file named 'iphone13_battery_checklist.txt', or a file manager/desktop view should show this file located on the Desktop (/home/ga/Desktop/).

task_completion.description: Verify that the checklist includes the required header.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file must contain the exact header 'iPhone 13 Battery Replacement Checklist' at or near the top of the document.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Difficulty' and 'Time Required' estimates are included in the checklist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file must contain sections or lines for 'Difficulty' and 'Time Required' with corresponding values extracted from the iFixit guide.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required tools are listed in the checklist.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file must contain a list of 'Tools' that includes Pentalobe, Tri-point, Spudger, Suction (or Suction Handle), and Pick (or Opening Picks).

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Notes' section contains the urgent safety warning regarding battery handling.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text file must contain a 'Notes' section that includes safety warnings about battery handling, specifically mentioning hazards like puncture, fire, swollen, explode, or thermal.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a web browser to find the guide.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser being used to navigate to or search for the iFixit guide, rather than the agent hallucinating the URL or content.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used a GUI text editor to create the checklist.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a graphical text editor (e.g., gedit, mousepad, VS Code) being used to write the checklist, rather than terminal commands like 'echo' or 'cat'.

integrity.description: Verify that the content in the text file matches the actual iFixit webpage.
integrity.visual_evidence: The estimates, tools, and safety warnings in the text file should clearly correspond to the content visible on the iFixit webpage shown in the browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target guide URL must contain 'ifixit.com/Guide/iPhone+13+Battery+Replacement'. The output file must be located at '/home/ga/Desktop/iphone13_battery_checklist.txt'. The required tools to look for in the checklist are: Pentalobe, Tri-point, Spudger, Suction, Pick. The safety warning in the Notes section should contain keywords such as: puncture, fire, swollen, explode, thermal.
